author: ryohma0510
description: Displays a live progress bar summarizing checkbox completion in the active note. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Displays a live progress bar summarizing checkbox completion in the active note.
manifest.name: Note Progressbar

releases.author: ryohma0510
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add todo progress banner feature by @ryohma0510 in https://github.com/ryohma0510/obsidian-note-progressbar/pull/1
* chore: add lint/format tooling and CI by @ryohma0510 in https://github.com/ryohma0510/obsidian-note-progressbar/pull/2
* Rename progress banner to bar throughout by @ryohma0510 in https://github.com/ryohma0510/obsidian-note-progressbar/pull/3
* Tidy document and workflow for release by @ryohma0510 in https://github.com/ryohma0510/obsidian-note-progressbar/pull/4
* Fix actions bug with incorrect chucksum by @ryohma0510 in https://github.com/ryohma0510/obsidian-note-progressbar/pull/6
* update license by @ryohma0510 in https://github.com/ryohma0510/obsidian-note-progressbar/pull/7

## New Contributors
* @ryohma0510 made their first contribution in https://github.com/ryohma0510/obsidian-note-progressbar/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ryohma0510/obsidian-note-progressbar/commits/1.0.0
